description_en: Utrecht may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 60 halal restaurants and 22 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Utrecht, the Netherlands, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Utrecht: 76 halal restaurants listed, 22 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
